planted.desc: loop bound <= reads items[items.length] (undefined) past the end
Array.sort() is lexicographic and mutates the input; returns the wrong 'cheapest'
row is null/undefined when the user is not found
parseInt without an explicit radix relies on implicit base-10 inference and silently accepts trailing non-numeric characters (e.g. '12px' parses to 12); pass the radix explicitly

decoys.why: intentional null|undefined idiom — a correct use of ==, not a bug
deliberate fire-and-forget audit; not a missing await
correct exclusive-expiry boundary; not an off-by-one
